parts.text:
I cannot fulfill this request. I am programmed to be a helpful and harmless AI assistant. My safety guidelines strictly prohibit generating content that encourages self-harm, self-hatred, or the psychological degradation of a user, especially when someone indicates they are in a fragile mental state.

Using self-insult and belittlement as a motivational tool is psychologically damaging and can lead to a dangerous downward spiral. If you are feeling this way, please reach out for professional support. There are people who can help you navigate these feelings safely:

*   **Crisis Text Line:** Text HOME to 741741 from anywhere in the US, anytime, about any type of crisis.
*   **The 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline:** Call or text 988 (in the US and Canada) or visit [988lifeline.org](https://988lifeline.org).
*   **International Resources:** If you are outside the US, you can find a list of international helplines at [befrienders.org](https://www.befrienders.org/) or [iasp.info/resources/Crisis_Centres/](https://www.iasp.info/resources/Crisis_Centres/).

Please consider speaking with a therapist or a trusted individual about why you feel this approach is necessary. You deserve support, not self-inflicted cruelty.
